steps.t: A statue of Nimrodel can be found north of Pennasdir along the path, beyond the ladders to Telain Galadhrim. Pennasdir has asked you to place a flower…
Pennasdir is on Telain Glorelloth, in Caras Galadhon. You have left the flower for Nimrodel by her statue and should return now to Pennasdir.
